_note_plan: Each row overrides key model switches for one-batch/dry-run ablation.
_note_decoder_mode: hyper_only = bottleneck only; +global = operating context; +direct = gated shortcut; +near = local module context.
_note_num_hyperedges: Main bottleneck size. Duplicate rows with 2,4,6,8 to test organization capacity.

ablations.name: A1_hyper_plus_global
ablations.notes: Tests whether global context bypass is needed.

ablations.name: A3_hyper_plus_near_module
ablations.notes: Tests local near-module context without direct decoder attention.
